summary: Comprehensive testing of PayPal integration, Promo Code checkout flow, and Admin Promotions dashboard. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/promotions/validate/WELCOME15?subtotal=50 returns valid=true, discount_amount=7.5 (15% off)
Backend: /api/promotions/validate/PAWS10?subtotal=80 returns valid=true, discount_amount=10 ($10 off)
Backend: /api/promotions/validate/PAWS10?subtotal=50 returns 400 (below $75 minimum)
Backend: /api/promotions/validate/SPRING25?subtotal=120 returns valid=true, discount_amount=30 (25% off)
Backend: /api/promotions/validate/SPRING25?subtotal=80 returns 400 (below $100 minimum)
Backend: /api/promotions/validate/INVALID_CODE returns 404
Backend: /api/checkout accepts promo_code parameter and creates checkout session
Backend: /api/checkout works without promo_code parameter
Backend: /api/paypal/create-order endpoint exists and accepts promo_code
Backend: /api/paypal/create-order rejects empty cart with 400 status
Backend: /api/admin/promotions returns all promotions (requires admin auth)
Backend: /api/admin/promotions requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Admin can create new promotions via /api/admin/promotions POST
Backend: Duplicate promotion code creation fails with 400
Backend: /api/promotions returns 4+ active promotions with required fields
Frontend: Cart page displays promo code input with Apply button
Frontend: Cart page shows suggested promo hints (WELCOME15, PAWS10, SPRING25)
Frontend: Cart page has Card and PayPal payment method selection buttons
Frontend: Promo code WELCOME15 applies correctly showing -$7.50 discount
Frontend: PayPal buttons render when PayPal payment method selected
Frontend: Admin Promotions page displays all 5 promotions with correct details
Frontend: Admin Promotions page shows stats (Total Promotions: 5, Active: 5, Total Uses: 0)
Frontend: Admin Promotions page has Create Promotion button
Frontend: Admin dashboard has Promotions button linking to /admin/promotions
seed_data_creation: 5 promotions exist: WELCOME15 (15% off first order), FREESHIP50 (free shipping $50+), PAWS10 ($10 off $75+), SPRING25 (25% off $100+), plus one TEST* promo from backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal integration uses sandbox mode (MOCKED - PayPal client ID is 'sb' sandbox default). The checkout now accepts promo_code parameter and correctly applies discounts. Cart page has: promo code input with Apply button, suggested codes hint, Card/PayPal payment method toggle. PayPal buttons render via @paypal/react-paypal-js package. Admin Promotions page at /admin/promotions shows all promotions with stats (Total Promotions, Active, Total Uses) and has Create Promotion button with dialog. Admin dashboard has Promotions link button.

mocked_apis.PayPal: Using sandbox mode with client ID 'sb'. Full PayPal payment flow cannot be tested without real PayPal account.

tested_codes.WELCOME15: 15% off, no minimum, first order only
